steps.title: Treat x plus 4 as a block
steps.content: Both sides contain $x+4$: $$5(x+4)=4(x+4)+29$$ Subtract $4(x+4)$ from both sides.

steps.title: Solve for the requested expression
steps.content: $$x+4=29$$ The problem asks for $x+4$, so no extra subtraction is needed.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is $29$, so it is correct. Choice B, $25$, is the value of $x$, not the requested value $x+4$.
